title: Tick Control New Rochelle, NY | Professional Tick Extermination $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in New Rochelle, NY. Expert tick extermination for residential & commercial properties. Same-day service available. Call now for $125-$325 treatment!
intro: New Rochelle residents face increasing tick populations due to the city's proximity to wooded areas, parks, and Long Island Sound waterfront properties. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from disease-carrying ticks throughout New Rochelle's diverse neighborhoods. We provide comprehensive tick treatments starting at $125-$325, tailored to your property's specific needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Westchester County for years with specialized tick control expertise perfect for New Rochelle's unique environment. Our licensed technicians understand the local tick species and use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating tick populations on your property.
localContext: From the waterfront homes along Echo Bay to the tree-lined streets near Hudson Park, New Rochelle's blend of urban and natural environments creates ideal tick habitats. Properties near Five Islands Park, Glen Island, and the numerous residential gardens require vigilant tick management, especially during peak season from April through October.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in New Rochelle range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size and the severity of the infestation. We offer free inspections and customized treatment plans for residential and commercial properties throughout New Rochelle and Westchester County.

faqs.question: When is tick season in New Rochelle, NY?
faqs.answer: Tick season in New Rochelle typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active during warmer winter days, so year-round vigilance is important, especially in wooded areas near the Sound Shore and local parks.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and family members inside during application and for 2-3 hours afterward until the treatment has dried completely.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule tick control treatments in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend tick control treatments every 4-6 weeks during peak tick season. Properties near wooded areas, Glen Island, or Hudson Park may benefit from monthly treatments. We'll create a customized schedule based on your property's specific risk factors and your family's outdoor activities.
